**Key Points**
- The context variable contained only a single dot (".") with no meaningful content.  
- No facts were extracted because the input lacked substantive information.  
- The document records the reasoning and workflow for handling an empty context in an RLM session.  
- A "meta context" was curated to document the absence of data.  
- The entry was created and updated on 2026-04-23 by the Context Engineer.
